features: Dove Care by Nature Invigorating Cream Shower Gel instantly helps to leave skin hydrated, radiant and soft. Infused with naturally derived ingredients, this cream shower gel helps soften and smooth dry and dull skin from the very first shower.
Formulated with naturally derived extracts and soothing ingredients, it helps to moisturize and brighten skin with every shower.
description: Product description Dove Care by Nature Invigorating Cream Shower Gel instantly helps to leave skin hydrated, radiant and soft. Infused with naturally derived ingredients, this cream shower gel helps soften and smooth dry and dull skin from the very first shower. Formulated with naturally derived extracts and soothing ingredients, it helps to moisturize and brighten skin with every shower. The cream shower gel contains 100% plant-based moisturizers and gentle cleansing ingredients to help cleanse and moisturize dry skin. Ingredients Product Specifications Search for features?
